name: meclinic-master
description: Script mestre para rodar Frontend (3050) e Backend (5000)

scripts.client: cd meclinic-app/client && set PORT=3050 && set NODE_OPTIONS=--no-warnings && npm start
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "🔵 BACKEND,🟢 FRONTEND" -c "cyan.bold,green.bold" --prefix-length 12 "npm run server" "npm run client"
